name: feature-callouts
title: FeatureCallouts
description: Dual-variant content-block section used twice on the PDP with different props. Variant 'reasons' shows numbered white cards with cocoa icon circles. Variant 'story' shows a centered video with TikTok-style engagement stats and creator chips.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
